name: hormozi-money
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's $100M Money Models framework — select the right revenue model, architect pricing for maximum value extraction, optimize LTV, and apply the More/Better/New decision framework to every revenue decision. Works across products, subscriptions, services, and asset businesses at any stage. Commands: /hormozi-money:model-picker, /hormozi-money:price-architect, /hormozi-money:ltv-optimizer, /hormozi-money:more-better-new.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — 4 Money Models, Pricing Architecture, LTV Maximizer, More/Better/New framework
